case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS SIEGEL SAMUEL C.IND/DBA.49 BRODERICK APTS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,784.68 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT SIEGEL SAMUEL C.IND/DBA.49 BRODERICK APTS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SIEGEL SAMUEL C.IND/DBA.49 BRODERICK APTS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIEGEL SAMUEL C.IND/DBA.49 BRODERICK APTS. $1,784.68 PRINCIPAL, $14.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,799.47 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO SAMUEL SIEGEL RETURNED, MOVED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SIEGEL SAMUEL C.IND/DBA.49 BRODERICK APTS.
